name: Broiled Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the steak.
2. Score the steak on both sides in 1 1/2 inch squares.
3. Place half of the onion slices in a 12 x 8 x 2 inch baking dish.
4. Top with the steak and then the remaining onion slices.
5. Combine the lemon rind and the remaining six ingredients; pour over the meat.
6. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours, turning the steak occasionally.
7. Remove the meat from the marinade and place it on a lightly greased rack in a broiler pan.
8. Remove the onion slices and discard the marinade.
9. Broil the steak 4 inches from the heat for 6 to 8 minutes on each side.
10. Cook the reserved onions in 1 tablespoon of butter in a skillet until crisp-tender.
11. To serve, slice the steak across the grain into thin slices; top with the onion.
